issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.
The skill is vendor-locked to ClearML and does not support other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: quick-experiment-tracking
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric items, while Response A lacks the two‑line auto‑capture claim and omits custom metric logging.

scenarios.name: hyperparameter-optimization
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B does not use HyperParameterOptimizer and omits required details.
